name: Grilled Shrimp with Bacon
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell and devein uncooked shrimp.
2. In a bowl, mix the lemon juice, catsup, hot pepper sauce, garlic, and oil.
3. Marinate the shrimp in the mixture for 30 minutes to 1 hour at room temperature.
4. Cut the bacon into thirds or halves and wrap it around each shrimp.
5. Thread the wrapped shrimp onto skewers.
6. Grill until the bacon is crisp, about 10 to 12 minutes. Turn several times and brush with the reserved marinade.
7. Bacon dripping may cause flare-ups on the grill, so keep a water spritzer handy.
8. Serve immediately with lemon wedges.
